properties.combined_effect: Red's attempts to shape the battlefield were largely thwarted by Blue's defensive measures. Red's UAV ISR efforts were intercepted by Blue's F-16s, resulting in significant losses. Red's mine-clearing operations faced heavy resistance from Blue's ATGM battalion, leading to high attrition among Red's minesweepers. Blue's counter-EW operations effectively neutralized Red's jamming attempts, maintaining Blue's C2 integrity.

properties.name_ar: قيادة المنطقة الجنوبية. (الفيلق الأول) وتشكل القيادة العملياتية
فرقة المشاة الآلية  4. وتتألف من التالي :
لواء المشاة الآلي41. (3 كتائب مشاة + كتيبة دبابات)
لواء المشاة الآلي42. (3 كتائب مشاة + كتيبة دبابات)

لواء المدفعية 45. (4) كتائب مدفعية متوسطة محمولة عيار 155 ملم + كتيبة مدفعية ثقيلة 175 ملم
لواء الدفاع الجوي 46.(1 كتيبة صواريخ سام 15+2 كتيبة مدفعية 35 ملم + كتيبة صواريخ كتف سام7)
كتيبة هندسة ميدان آلية 403. (5) سرايا هندسة ميدان
كتيبة الاشارة 404 . تتألف من 5 سرايا إشارة

properties.action_what: Initiate continuous EW operations to jam Blue's C2.
properties.action_why: Persistent EW will degrade Blue's ability to coordinate their defense and react to Red's operations.
properties.action_intended_effect: Reduce Blue's command and control effectiveness.
properties.cause_what: EW operations countered by Blue
properties.cause_doctrine: Doctrines.md - Air defense planning at brigade and below

properties.name_ar: لواء المشاة الآلي 91. (3 كتائب مشاة + كتيبة دبابات)
لواء المشاة الآلي 92. (3 كتائب مشاة + كتيبة دبابات)
اللواء المدرع 94.(2 كتيبة دبابات+كتيبة مشاة آلية)
لواء المشاة الآلي 13. (3 كتيبة مشاة آلية + كتيبة دبابـات)
اللواء المدرع 11. (2 كتيبة دبابات + كتيبة مشاة آليـة)
اسلحة الاسناد والخدمات. كما في فرقة المشاة الآلية4
لواء المشاة 23. مؤلف من   4 كتائب مشاة (233،232،231، 34) + 12 زورق مسيِّر متفجر

properties.action_what: Deploy mine layers to reinforce sea denial and prepare the approach corridor.
properties.action_why: Establishing sea control is essential for power projection and protecting the landing force.
properties.action_intended_effect: Secure the approach corridor by deterring Blue naval movements.
properties.cause_what: Mine-laying operations disrupted by coastal support boats
properties.cause_doctrine: Doctrines.md - Obstacle effects: disrupt, fix, turn, block

properties.action_what: Deploy mine sweepers to clear a path through Blue's minefields.
properties.action_why: Clearing mines is necessary to ensure safe passage for the amphibious landing forces.
properties.action_intended_effect: Create a secure corridor for landing operations.
properties.cause_what: Mine sweepers engaged by ATGM battalion
properties.cause_doctrine: Wonsan 1950: 50% MCM attrition under coastal artillery overwatch

properties.name_ar: القوات الجوية والدفاع الجوي. مؤلف كالتالي :
سرب طائرات مسيَّرة  مراقبة واستطلاع     (12 طائرة)
properties.action_what: Deploy UAVs for ISR to identify Blue's defensive positions and reserve locations.
properties.action_why: ISR is crucial for identifying gaps and weaknesses in Blue's defenses to exploit during the assault.
properties.action_intended_effect: Gain actionable intelligence on Blue's defensive layout.
action_doctrine_cited: AJP-3.3 Air & Space Operations Ed B
properties.cause_what: UAVs intercepted by F-16 squadron
properties.cause_doctrine: Doctrines.md - C-UAS defeats Group 1-5 UAS

properties.action_what: Conduct a UAV strike on identified Blue radar installations.
properties.action_why: Disrupting Blue's radar capabilities will degrade their situational awareness and defensive response.
properties.action_intended_effect: Reduce Blue's radar coverage and reaction time.
properties.cause_what: UAV strike on radar installations intercepted
properties.cause_doctrine: Doctrines.md - Air defense planning at brigade and below

properties.name_ar: العمليات الخاصة. لواء عمليات خاصة 21 مؤلف كالتالي :

properties.action_what: Insert SOF to conduct reconnaissance and disrupt Blue's rear-area C2.
properties.action_why: Vertical envelopment with SOF can create chaos and confusion in Blue's command structure.
properties.action_intended_effect: Disrupt Blue's command and control in the rear area.
properties.cause_what: SOF reconnaissance disrupted by signal battalion
properties.cause_doctrine: Doctrines.md - Defense types: area defense, mobile defense, retrograde

properties.name_ar: لواء صواريخ أرض/أرض متوسط المدى (500 - 600) كيلومتر
properties.action_what: Held in reserve — preserving SSM magazine for H-hour saturation salvo per opening-day concentration doctrine.
properties.action_why: Holding SSMs for a decisive initial strike aligns with the doctrine of overwhelming the defender's intercept capacity at the critical moment.
properties.action_intended_effect: Maximize impact during the initial assault by conserving strategic missiles.

properties.name_ar: فرقة المشاة الآلية 2. تؤمن الحماية للقواعد والاهداف الحيوية
العمل الممكن رقم 1. الهجوم على blue team لاحتلال الهدف X على ثلاث مراحل وكما يلي:
المرحلة الأولى. ابرار عناصر الاستطلاع والتأمين والمقدمة لتأمين نقاط الابرار وبعمق 1 – 2 كم

المرحلة الثانية. اقتحام الدفاعات الرئيسة والاستيلاء على مناطق الابرار وتوسيع رأس الشاطئ بفرقة المشاة الرابعة الى عمق (8 - 10) كم مع تطوير الهجوم بالقوة اللاحقة فرقة المشاة  الآلية 9  الى عمق العدو باتجاه الجنوب للاستيلاء على خط حيوي الى عمق (40 – 50) كم

properties.action_what: Held position — preserving strategic assets for future engagement per ADP 3-0.
properties.action_why: Strategic assets are held to ensure readiness for decisive engagements when Red reaches culmination.
properties.action_intended_effect: Maintain strategic advantage and readiness for future phases.

properties.action_what: Deploy ATGM battalion to cover minefields and engage Red mine sweepers.
properties.action_why: Ensure minefields are effective by providing overwatch and fire support.
properties.action_intended_effect: Prevent Red from clearing minefields and maintain sea denial.
action_doctrine_cited: Doctrines.md - Countermobility = terrain reinforcement + obstacle employment
properties.cause_what: Engaged Red mine sweepers
properties.cause_doctrine: Doctrines.md - Countermobility = terrain reinforcement + obstacle employment

properties.action_what: Deploy signal battalion to monitor and counter Red SOF reconnaissance activities.
properties.action_why: Protect rear-area C2 from disruption and maintain communication integrity.
properties.action_intended_effect: Deny Red SOF effective reconnaissance and disruption capabilities.
action_doctrine_cited: Doctrines.md - Defense types: area defense, mobile defense, retrograde
properties.cause_what: Countered Red SOF reconnaissance

properties.action_intended_effect: Neutralize Red's EW operations and maintain C2 effectiveness.

properties.cause_what: Counter-EW operations against Red jamming

properties.action_what: Deploy coastal support boats to monitor and disrupt Red mine-laying operations.
properties.action_why: Prevent Red from reinforcing sea denial and ensure our minefields remain effective.
properties.action_intended_effect: Disrupt Red's mine-laying efforts and maintain control over the maritime domain.
action_doctrine_cited: Doctrines.md - Obstacle effects: disrupt, fix, turn, block

properties.cause_doctrine: Doctrines.md - Obstacle effects: disrupt, fix, turn, block

properties.action_what: Activate coastal radar systems to detect and track incoming UAVs targeting radar installations.
properties.action_why: Protect critical radar infrastructure from UAV strikes.
properties.action_intended_effect: Preserve radar capabilities and maintain situational awareness.
action_doctrine_cited: Doctrines.md - Air defense planning at brigade and below
properties.cause_what: Protected radar installations from UAV strike
properties.cause_doctrine: Doctrines.md - Air defense planning at brigade and below

properties.cause_what: Sorties flown to intercept Red UAVs
